name: brave-search
description: Cheap, broad web search: ranked links with descriptions + extra snippets and a recency filter. Links-only (no answer or page content — web_fetch a result to read it). API key from search.brave.com.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Brave API Key
x-meta.help: Your Brave Search API subscription token (search.brave.com). Leave empty to fall back to the BRAVE_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search response.
